name: GW2 Event Tracker
description: Track meta and world boss schedules, get lead-time and event-started alerts, and see which daily rewards you have already claimed. Includes a Next Up overlay, Daily Progress tab, map-aware filtering, custom event profiles, and a what-should-I-do-next recommender. Schedules from giovazz89 timer data with optional remote updates.

account.details: Filter alerts and show completion for daily world boss and map chest rewards.

progression.details: Read account progression data for daily reward tracking.
